[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000000 a
1 0000000 a
2 0010101 3
3 0010101 3
4 1000100 2
5 1000000 1
6 1000000 1
7 1110010 4

01 10 0010101 3 match 2 3
12 21 0010101 3 match 2 3
23 32 1000100 2 match 4
34 43 1000000 1 match 5 6
45 54 1000000 1 match 5 6
56 65 1110010 4 match 7
67 76 1110010 4 match 7
70 07 0110100 3

02 20 0010101 3 match 2 3
13 31 0000100 1
24 42 1000001 2
35 53 1100000 2
46 64 1001001 3
57 75 1110010 4 match 7
60 06 0111001 4
71 17 0010100 2

47 74 1000000 1 match 5 6
50 05 0110000 2

72 27 1010110 4
